name: Fish in Island Sauce (Pescado Al Mojo Isle=f1o)
recipeIngredient: 6 fish filets (preferably grouper or "mero" in Spanish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a frying pan. Fry garlic until golden.
2. Clean fish filets and fry in the same grease until golden on both sides.
3. In the same pan, fry onions until transparent.
4. Add tomatoes and pepper; cook until flavors meld.
5. Stir in olives, vinegar, and laurel leaf.
6. Cook on low flame for 10 minutes.
7. Pour sauce over fish filets and serve immediately.
